title: Run Status Schema
description: Schema for tracking the lifecycle and state machine of an ACMS run. Enforces invariant C‑3 by constraining allowed states and capturing atomic mutation ledger updates.

state.description: Current state in the run lifecycle.

current_task_id.description: ID of the task currently being executed, if any.

start_time.description: Timestamp when the run was created.

end_time.description: Timestamp when the run finished successfully or failed.

task_counters.description: Counts of tasks by status within the run.

lock.description: Indicates whether a mutation is currently being applied. The ledger must not be mutated when the lock is false.
